messages.message: 'router' is assigned a value but never used.

source:
'use client' import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation' import Link from 'next/link' export default function AdminPage() { const router = useRouter() return (
{/* Navigation */}
← Back to Dashboard

Admin Panel

{/* Main Content */}

Admin Features

Admin functionality coming soon...

) }
